title: scutellaria fragillima
intro: Scutellaria fragillima, also known as the small skullcap, is a perennial plant in the mint family native to Eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to treat anxiety and stress. The health benefits of Scutellaria fragillima include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine.
